demographics.living_situation: shares a flat with a housemate

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: (Housemate typing) My flatmate is in a really bad way. She's got this pounding, burning headache that came on a few hours ago, any light or noise seems like agony to her, her face and neck have gone red and hot, and she's so foggy she can barely get her words out. Normal painkillers did nothing.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been getting worse over the last few hours and the usual painkillers aren't touching it — she can't really function or talk properly.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 3 hours ago — her face flushed first, then the headache came on
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours and getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: throbbing with a burning, pressure feeling
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says it's really severe, one of the worst she's had
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started and building up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying in a dark, silent room helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any light or sound, and moving around
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: her face and neck are red and burning, she feels shaky inside, totally wiped out, and she's struggling to think clearly and find her words
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: she gets flare-ups like this with her mast cell / histamine problem, but she says this one is worse than usual
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound in a dark room, can't tolerate conversation or moving

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a suspected mast cell / histamine problem

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: shares a flat; her housemate is with her and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: her face and neck look flushed and red
she's wearing sunglasses indoors and covering her ears — light and sound are clearly distressing her
housemate says she doesn't feel hot to touch and hasn't been shivering
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: an impression by touch, not a measured temperature

objective_data_offered.value: housemate says she can still move both arms and legs normally and is talking, just very foggy and slow
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: a companion's impression, not a formal neurological examination
